content.intro: To support your daily lunch expenses, Alenia Spain provides a meal allowance of €10 per working day.

subsections.title: 💸 How does it work?
bullets: The allowance is paid directly on your monthly payslip
It is calculated based on the number of actual working days in the month
The value is €10 per day worked
It appears as a net benefit on your payroll
Example: If you work 20 days in a month, you'll receive €200 in meal allowance.

subsections.title: 📌 Who is eligible?
subsections.text: All employees of Alenia Spain with an active contract are eligible for the meal allowance. No action is needed on your part — it's calculated and applied automatically.

subsections.title: ❓ Questions?
subsections.text: If you have any questions regarding the meal allowance, feel free to reach out to:

content.intro: At Alenia, your health and well-being matter. That's why we've partnered with Alan, a modern health insurance provider offering comprehensive coverage to support you in both routine care and unexpected medical situations.

subsections.title: ✅ What Alan offers:
bullets: Full coverage for general and specialist consultations
Reimbursement for medical expenses, optical, and dental care
Direct access to your digital health account via the Alan app
24/7 medical chat support and wellness tools

subsections.title: 📲 Manage everything in one app
subsections.text: Alan is 100% digital. You can track reimbursements, consult your coverage, and speak to healthcare professionals, all from your smartphone.

subsections.title: 📝 How to enroll?
subsections.text: Health insurance with Alan is optional but recommended. Alenia covers 50% of the cost.
bullets: If you're interested in joining the plan, simply let us know!
Send a message to admin-espana@alenia.io, and we'll walk you through the enrollment process.

links.label: For full details about your plan and benefits, visit Alan

subsections.title: 📌 Important Notes
bullets: For the first 3 days of "standard" sick leave and those exceeding 30 days, the employer may apply the employer's maintenance, thus eliminating the 3-day waiting period for the employee.
The contribution base is limited to €4,909.50, the 2025 ceiling.

subsections.title: ⚠️ Exception: Case of rest advised by the doctor
subsections.text: These 3 days of rest advised by the doctor do not correspond to sick leave and are not paid. The employee must provide the supporting document to the company.

content.intro: On your BoondManager profile, you can access your "Absence Balance" via the "Absences" tab. You will find several pieces of information:

subsections.title: Acquired/Ongoing
subsections.text: Which corresponds to the total available leave days.

subsections.title: Acquired (Year N-1)
subsections.text: This balance will be lost if not used before its expiration date.

subsections.title: Being Acquired (Year N)
subsections.text: This amount is incremented on the first of each month.
subsections.note: 📆 Prorata temporis from your arrival date, rounded down to the nearest half-day. Once reduced by the number of leave days taken, this amount will be transferred to Acquired on January 1st of Year N+1.

subsections.title: Taken
subsections.text: Number of leave days taken in your activity reports before this month.
subsections.warning: ⚠️ It is important that your Activity Reports are fully validated to ensure that the balance of consumed leave days is up to date.

subsections.title: Requested
subsections.text: Number of leave declared from this month.
subsections.tip: 💡 It is therefore important to anticipate your requests in order to keep the calculation up to date.
